item.title: subtract overflow for `kernel_code_vaddr_to_paddr` in ptr_get_alloc
item.body:
https://github.com/KMiri-rs/miri/blob/5d7cd15dac6bc604ddbbc72f7cdeed999b3b6557/src/alloc_addresses/mod.rs#L759-L762

```rust
pub fn kernel_code_vaddr_to_paddr(vaddr: usize) -> usize {
    vaddr - super::kernel_code_base_vaddr()
}
```
